query:
-- First, count how many services can be matched via octane_customer_links MSISDN
SELECT COUNT(*) as matchable_via_octane
FROM services s
JOIN octane_customer_links ocl ON s.phoneNumber = ocl.msisdn
WHERE ocl.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '' OR s.customerExternalId = 'NULL');

-- First, count how many services can be matched via octane_customer_links MSISDN
SELECT COUNT(*) as matchable_via_octane
FROM services s
JOIN octane_customer_links ocl ON s.phoneNumber = ocl.msisdn
WHERE ocl.internalCustomerExternalId IS NOT NULL
  AND (s.customerExternalId IS NULL OR s.customerExternalId = '' OR s.customerExternalId = 'NULL');
